'''√w-y-zh''' ('''wayazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curarize|curarize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curarize|curarize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √w-y-zh
|-
! Lemma
| wayazha
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || wayazhithi || wayazhiji || wayazhishi || wayazhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || wayazhuthuth || wayazhujuj || wayazhushush || wayazh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || wayazhuthu || wayazhuju || wayazhushu || wayazhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || wayazhufuth || wayazhufuj || wayazhufush || wayazhuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || wayazhethe || wayazheje || wayazheshe || wayazhe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || wayazhothoth || wayazhojoj || wayazhoshosh || wayazh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || wayazhotho || wayazhojo || wayazhosho || wayazho
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || wayazhofoth || wayazhofoj || wayazhofosh || wayazhof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || wayazhïf || wayazhïf || wayazhïf || wayazhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || wayazhïfïf || wayazhïfïf || wayazhïfïf || wayazhïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || wayazhïf || wayazhïf || wayazhïf || wayazhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || wayazhïf || wayazhïf || wayazhïf || wayazhïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || wayazhæthæ || wayazhæjæ || wayazhæshæ || wayazhæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || wayazhathath || wayazhajaj || wayazhashash || wayazh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || wayazhatha || wayazhaja || wayazhasha || wayazha
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || wayazhafath || wayazhafaj || wayazhafash || wayazhaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || wayazhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gowayazhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokiwayazhasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || wayazhnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gowayazhnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokiwayazhnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || wayazhshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gowayazhnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokiwayazhshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || wayazhroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gowayazhnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokiwayazhroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || wayazhmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gowayazhnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokiwayazhmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || wayazhsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gowayazhnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokiwayazhsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || wayazhngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gowayazhnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokiwayazhngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || wayazhyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gowayazhnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokiwayazhyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || wayazhyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gowayazhnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokiwayazhyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || wayazhnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gowayazhnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokiwayazhnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || wayazhnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gowayazhnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokiwayazhnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || wayazhnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gowayazhnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokiwayazhnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || wayazhshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gowayazhnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokiwayazhshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || wayazhshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gowayazhnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokiwayazhshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || wayazhshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gowayazhnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokiwayazhshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || wayazhronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gowayazhnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokiwayazhronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || wayazhroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gowayazhnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokiwayazhroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || wayazhromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gowayazhnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokiwayazhromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || wayazhmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gowayazhnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokiwayazhmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || wayazhmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gowayazhnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokiwayazhmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || wayazhmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gowayazhnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokiwayazhmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || wayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || wæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || howayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || howæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohowayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohowæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüwayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüwæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüwayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüwæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïwayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïwæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïwayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïwæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || luwayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || luwæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luluwayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luluwæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || liwayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || liwæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || liliwayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || liliwæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kowayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kowæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokowayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokowæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kewayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kewæyæzh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekewayazh
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekewæyæzh
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
